revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template talk:Category:日本史の人物 (旧国・地域名別)]] to [[Template talk:Category:Historical figures in Japan (categorized by former province/region)]]: Text replacement - "日本史の人物 (旧国・地域名別)" to "Historical figures in Japan (categorized by former province/region)"
